introSection: Wriggler is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group and is currently located at Gulliver's Valley Resort in Rotherham, South Yorkshire, England, UK. It opened in 2023.
fullText: Wriggler is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group and is currently located at Gulliver's Valley Resort in Rotherham, South Yorkshire, England, UK. It opened in 2023.
